ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., ECS) */,
  "location_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "location_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the location */,
  "location_manager" TEXT /* Name of the manager responsible for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_modules" (
  "process_module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process module */,
  "process_module_name" TEXT /* Name of the process module (e.g., PM1) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the process module is installed */,
  "module_description" TEXT /* Description of the process module */,
  "module_status" TEXT /* Current status of the process module (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the device is installed */,
  "process_module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the process module used by the device */,
  "RMA" TEXT /* RMA details for the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., FlowFlange, Spindle) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, under repair) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_process_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_module_id") REFERENCES process_modules ("process_module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device that raised the alarm */,
  "alarm_category" TEXT /* Category of the alarm (e.g., Warning1, Warning2) */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter that triggered the alarm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm */,
  "alarm_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alarm (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alarm_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alarm was raised */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who acknowledged the alarm */,
  "acknowledged_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alarm was acknowledged */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who resolved the alarm */,
  "resolved_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alarm was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_parameter FOREIGN KEY ("parameter") REFERENCES alarm_parameters ("alarm_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_acknowledged_by FOREIGN KEY ("acknowledged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_alarm_category FOREIGN KEY ("alarm_category") REFERENCES alarm_categories ("alarm_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarm_categories" (
  "alarm_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm category */,
  "alarm_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the alarm category (e.g., Warning1, Warning2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm category */,
  "category_severity" TEXT /* Severity level associated with the alarm category (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "category_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the alarm category */,
  "category_response_time" INTEGER /* Expected response time in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarm_parameters" (
  "alarm_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm parameter */,
  "alarm_parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the alarm parameter (e.g., NotProcessingNotificationLevel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter (e.g., degrees, volts) */,
  "parameter_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers the alarm */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_activities" (
  "maintenance_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device on which the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity (e.g., scheduled, unscheduled) */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the activity */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Completion date of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "activity_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity_performed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_activities_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_activities_activity_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("activity_performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, alarm acknowledgement) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "activity_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location where the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, engineer, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Operator, Engineer, Administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "process_module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the process module */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access control entry */,
  "access_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the access control entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_process_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_module_id") REFERENCES process_modules ("process_module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., alarm report, maintenance report) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, archived) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
